profile.name: Abhinav Kumar Tiwari
profile.heroBio: Passionate tech learner sharing knowledge through blogs. Focusing on backend architecture, reactive interfaces, and continuous learning.
profile.aboutBio1: I am an MCA student and a passionate tech learner who loves sharing knowledge through blogs. I regularly write about JavaScript, programming concepts, and software development topics.
profile.aboutBio2: Currently, I am focusing on becoming a full stack developer while improving my problem-solving and communication skills.
